creator: hawara@gmail.com
text:
If port rubygem-facter is built in tinderbox, or using a 'make package' command it fails, probably due to incorrect pkg-plist

pkg-plist lists files as
%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter.rb
%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/Cfkey.rb
..etc, actually port installs them in 
/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8/gems/facter-1.6.18/lib/facter.rb etc...

fail follows:
===>   Registering installation for rubygem-facter-1.6.18
===>  Building package for rubygem-facter-1.6.18

pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** [do-package] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-facter.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-facter && make package
